acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.collateralToken_: ERC20 collateral token used by the protocol.
params.initialOwner: Governance owner allowed to manage authorized modules.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.isAuthorized: True to authorize, false to revoke.
params.module: Module address to authorize or revoke.

transferOut(address,uint256).details: Intended for withdrawal workflows coordinated by authorized modules.

params.user: User whose vault balance is reduced.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner.

availableBalance(address).notice: Returns a user's currently available (unlocked) collateral balance.

constructor.notice: Deploys MarginVault with an owner and collateral token.

deposit(uint256).notice: Deposits collateral into the vault for the caller.

lockMargin(address,uint256).notice: Locks a user's available balance as margin.

setAuthorizedModule(address,bool).notice: Updates whether a protocol module can lock/unlock and transfer settlement funds.

transferOut(address,uint256).notice: Transfers available collateral out on behalf of a user.

transferSettlement(address,uint256).notice: Sends settlement funds from vault liquidity to a recipient.

unlockMargin(address,uint256).notice: Unlocks previously locked margin for a user.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Withdraws available (unlocked) collateral for the caller.
